logDir.label: Log Directory
logDir.help: Directory where tamper-evident audit logs are stored

captureMode.label: Capture Mode
captureMode.help: metadata_only: record hashes and lengths only (privacy-safe). full_capture: record raw content.

rotation.strategy.label: Rotation Strategy
rotation.strategy.help: daily: one file per day. session: one file per session. size: rotate by file size.

rotation.maxSizeBytes.label: Max Log File Size (bytes)
rotation.maxSizeBytes.help: Only used when rotation strategy is 'size'

redaction.mode.label: Redaction Mode
redaction.mode.help: hash: replace with SHA-256. omit: remove field. truncate: keep first N chars.

redaction.fields.label: Redaction Fields
redaction.fields.help: Dot-notation paths to redact in full_capture mode (e.g. payload.content)

captureBeforeToolCall.label: Capture Before Tool Call
captureBeforeToolCall.help: Record tool parameters before execution (may expose sensitive args)
